jurisdictions.name: Hong Kong
jurisdictions.coverage_notes: Founding jurisdiction. Live RSS watcher (SFC + HKMA feeds), live analyst/verifier via a scheduled automated run, fully seeded.

jurisdictions.name: United States
jurisdictions.coverage_notes: Live RSS/HTML-diff/JSON-API watcher (SEC + CFTC + FinCEN + OCC + Federal Reserve + Federal Register feeds), seeded. Live analyst/verifier via a scheduled automated run, extended here 2026-07-14 (owner-approved, alongside eu/uk/uae/ch/jp).

jurisdictions.name: European Union
jurisdictions.coverage_notes: Live RSS watcher (European Commission + ESMA + EBA + ECB + AMLA feeds), seeded. Live analyst/verifier via a scheduled automated run, extended here 2026-07-14 (owner-approved, alongside us/uk/uae/ch/jp).

jurisdictions.name: United Kingdom
jurisdictions.coverage_notes: Live RSS/Atom watcher (FCA + Bank of England + HM Treasury feeds), seeded. Live analyst/verifier via a scheduled automated run, extended here 2026-07-14 (owner-approved, alongside us/eu/uae/ch/jp).

jurisdictions.name: Singapore
jurisdictions.coverage_notes: Manual-assisted watcher, by design, not oversight: MAS (mas.gov.sg) and Singapore Statutes Online block non-browser clients outright, and this project chose honest, descriptive-User-Agent fetching over impersonating a browser to get past that block. So no automated feed polls MAS on a daily cron -- mechanism status is 'dormant' (exists in principle, not currently polling), distinct from 'planned' (nothing built yet), because real content is here. Coverage instead comes from periodic manual seed_backfill review: a human or a one-off fetch supplies specific document URLs (from MAS's Singapore Press Centre PDF mirror, IRAS, and the Parliament of Singapore, all of which are honestly fetchable) for the analyst to cite, rather than a live daily poll.

jurisdictions.name: United Arab Emirates
jurisdictions.coverage_notes: Live RSS/HTML-diff/sitemap-diff watcher (VARA + SCA/CMA + DFSA + FSRA (ADGM) feeds), seeded. Live analyst/verifier via a scheduled automated run, extended here 2026-07-14 (owner-approved, alongside us/eu/uk/ch/jp).
